name: Hexnode
description: Hexnode UEM integration for device management, compliance monitoring, and policy enforcement

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Hexnode MDM admin portal
2. Go to Admin > API
3. Enable the 'Enable API Access' checkbox
4. Copy your API key
5. Enter your portal name (the subdomain before .hexnodemdm.com) and the API key above

checks.name: Device Inventory
checks.description: Retrieve and verify all enrolled devices in Hexnode MDM

checks.name: Device Compliance
checks.description: Check compliance status across all managed devices in Hexnode

checks.name: Policy Enforcement
checks.description: Verify that security policies are configured and applied to devices in Hexnode

checks.name: User Management
checks.description: Verify user enrollment status and management in Hexnode

checks.name: Device Activity Monitoring
checks.description: Check for inactive or stale devices that have not reported recently
